name: GitHub, PR Queue
description: Your open PRs + PRs awaiting your review. Each row leads with a draft / ready-for-review glyph, carries a PR-age chip (muted → ochre → terracotta → plum as the PR ages), and a comment-bubble chip showing discussion activity. Sections are sorted oldest-first so the staler PR floats to the top. Requires a PAT in Plugins → GitHub Core.
